description: Your WordPress installation (currently running in Firefox) was flagged in a security audit for using the default 'wp_' database prefix. Harden the installation by migrating the database prefix to 'sec24_'. This includes updating the configuration file, renaming all database tables, and migrating internal metadata keys—specifically 'wp_user_roles', 'wp_capabilities', and 'wp_user_level'—to use the new prefix. Ensure no tables starting with 'wp_' remain and that the site and admin panel are fully functional.
